title: Repo/run locking
goal: Prevent unsafe concurrent runs against the same repository and branch namespace.
acceptance: Starting a second active run for a repo fails with a clear error.
Resuming the same run is allowed when no other run is active.
The lock is based on daemon state and survives CLI process boundaries.
must_ask_if: The slice requires changing the JSON-only worker result contract incompatibly.
The implementation would remove existing CLI/daemon commands.
Acceptance criteria conflict with the Khazad-Doom rule: You shall not slop.
